message:
feat(core): add optimization isomorphism proof gate and golden artifacts

Adds GoldenArtifact with checksum verification, ProofGateVerdict
(Equivalent/IsomorphicEquivalent/SemanticDrift/ChecksumFailure),
ProofGateConfig, ProofSummary, ProofGate with register/check/
check_all/remove/reset, plus degradation/snapshot/log types.
25 unit tests. (ft-2p9cb.5.4.1)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
